feed.title: HK
feed.subtitle: Personal blog collecting musings and learnings from work and life.

entry.title: Why I Decided To Resume Blogging @ 40

link.title: Why I Decided To Resume Blogging @ 40

entry.summary: Yes, I’m 40+. No, this is not a mid-life crisis. I used to blog about stuff about 15 years ago, when I was a totally different person. Then after a few years, I stopped. Then I even removed my blog. I changed. Like every other person, I have had many personal experiences in life that have taught me many lessons, and almost all of them the hard way, i.e., the test first and the lesson afterwar...
